mechanism_narrative: A low federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, increasing present values and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
evidence_refs: fact: current FEDFUNDS=0.41 is at the lower bound
failure_condition: If forward returns are not significantly positive in periods with FEDFUNDS below 0.5% (p>0.1), reject.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate above 4.5% signals softening labor market conditions, reducing aggregate demand and corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If in months with UNRATE>4.5%, 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of cases, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously high industrial production and high housing starts indicate robust economic activity across both manufacturing and construction sectors, collectively boosting corporate earnings and yielding positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: If when both INDPRO>100 and HOUST>1200, 5-day forward returns are negative more than 50% of the time, reject.

mechanism_narrative: In a low unemployment regime (UNRATE below 5%), high payroll employment further validates a strong labor market, increasing consumer spending and earnings, lifting equity prices over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: If during months when UNRATE<5%, 20-day forward returns following high PAYEMS (above 145,000) are not statistically significantly positive (t-test p>0.05), reject.

mechanism_narrative: A high CPI reading (above 240) signals elevated inflation, increasing the likelihood of monetary tightening which raises discount rates and depresses equity valuations, producing negative 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: If 20-day forward returns are not negative with statistical significance (p<0.10) following months with CPIAUCSL >240, reject.

mechanism_narrative: High retail sales (RSAFS) combined with high GDP (GDPC1) indicate strong underlying consumer demand and overall economic expansion, which together boost corporate revenues and support positive equity returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: If when both RSAFS>460000 (current threshold) and GDPC1>16500, 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of instances, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A high industrial production index signals strong manufacturing output, reflecting healthy economic activity that supports corporate profits and drives positive S&P 500 returns over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: If 5-day forward returns following months with INDPRO above 100 have a Sharpe ratio below 0 (i.e., negative average returns), reject.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above 1,300 thousand units signal strong demand in the residential investment sector, a leading indicator for broader economic expansion, resulting in positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If in periods with HOUST>1300, 20-day forward returns are negative more often than not (percentage of positive returns <= 50%), reject.
